name: NYIT Campus Events
subtitle: NYIT Old Westbury Campus Events App
description: The official NYIT Old Westbury campus events app. RSVP for events, check in via QR code, and stay up to date with campus announcements.

apps.name: NYIT Events
apps.subtitle: NYIT Old Westbury Campus Events
apps.localizedDescription:
The official NYIT Old Westbury campus events app.

• Browse and RSVP for campus events
• Check in via QR code
• Real-time event updates
• Campus map with building locations
• Event notifications and announcements

versions.localizedDescription: v1.3.0 - Always require login, hidden past events, study groups, admin improvements.
